title: mlx-nufft: non-uniform FFTs (types 1/2/3, dims 1/2/3) on Apple GPUs via Metal/MLX
description: An independent implementation of non-uniform fast Fourier transforms (types 1, 2, and 3, in 1/2/3 dimensions) for Apple-silicon GPUs via Metal/MLX, with a drop-in FINUFFT-compatible Python interface. Uses a float32 execute pipeline with double precision confined to plan-time coordinate setup, achieving fp64-grade accuracy (relative L2 ~1e-5) on hardware without native double precision. Validated against CPU FINUFFT and an exact direct-summation oracle.
